title: Unit Traceability
description: Full test history and measurement detail for a specific serial number

list.name: serial
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT uut_serial_number FROM runs WHERE uut_serial_number IS NOT NULL ORDER BY uut_serial_number DESC LIMIT 200

targets.rawSql: SELECT run_id, session_id, started_at, ended_at, outcome, phase, station_id, station_name, num_measurements FROM runs WHERE uut_serial_number = '${serial}' ORDER BY started_at DESC

SELECT run_id, step_name, measurement_name, value, units, limit_low, limit_high, nominal, outcome, measurement_timestamp FROM measurement_values WHERE uut_serial_number = '${serial}' ORDER BY measurement_timestamp DESC LIMIT 500
